entry.title: Lissy93 opened a pull request in web-check
entry.content:
Lissy93 opened Lissy93/web-check#296 · May 8, 2026 09:58
chore: Move into packages, monorepo #296

Migrates Web-Check into a monorepo architecture. Now the API, live app, and public homepage are seperate packages.

  • Fixes #291
+2,951 -6,790
1 comment

entry.title: Lissy93 released 2.1.0 at Lissy93/web-check
entry.content:
Lissy93 released 2.1.0 of Lissy93/web-check · May 7, 2026 14:01
Lissy93 / /Lissy93/web-check
Web Check V2.1.0

What's Changed

  • Update firewall.js, add QRATOR WAF by @n0a in #137
  • Update firewall.js, add ddos-guard WAF by @n0a in #143
  • CICD: bumped GHA versions by @vitalykarasik in #145
  • Sort openPorts and fail…

Contributors
